senses.gloss: to aim, point, or direct (something, such as a ranged weapon, like an arrow)
to amend (something deemed to be a mistake or an error), to correct, to rectify, to right, to remedy; to straighten
to inform (someone) that he or she is correct; to deem (someone or something, such as an opinion) acceptable, correct, or conforming; to agree with, to concur with; to consent to
to inform (someone) that he or she is correct; to deem (someone or something, such as an opinion) acceptable, correct, or conforming; to approve; to sanction; to validate; to confirm; to verify

examples.text: أطلقت قوات الاحتلال النيران بكثافة صوب الشاب ما أدى إلى إصابته بجروح بالغة الخطورة.
examples.english: The occupation forces launched the fire densely towards the young man which lead to serious wounds being inflicted on him.
